item.title: Draganfly’s CEO Says Drones Are Becoming Intelligence Platforms—Not Just Hardware
item.description: Draganfly argues that drones are shifting to intelligence platforms. See defense demand signals, “made-here” trends, and recent AFSOC training/FPV mom...

item.title: Booking Holdings Split: The Catalyst Wall Street Didn’t See Coming
item.description: Booking Holdings announced a 25-for-1 stock split after strong earnings, but AI disruption fears has investors questioning the near-term outlook

item.title: Waiting for Walmart to Pull Back? Now’s the Time to Buy
item.description: Walmart is on track to hit record highs, but first, the market needs to catch up with reality, digest the guidance, and prepare for its next run.

item.title: The Hidden Value in Genuine Parts Company’s Spin-Off Plan
item.description: Genuine Parts Company’s recent selloff offers value investors a chance to buy an industrial distributor before it spins off as a standalone firm.
